steps.name: $("open") https://www.flipkart.com
$("webdriver") create()
Flipkart popup closed
$("By.xpath: //input[@name='q']") set value(iphone)
$("By.xpath: //input[@name='q']") press enter()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id]") should have(size > 0)
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[0]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[1]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[2]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[3]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[4]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[5]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[6]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[7]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[8]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[9]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[10]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[11]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[12]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") exists()
$("By.xpath: //div[@data-id].snapshot(24 elements)[12]/By.xpath: .//*[contains(text(),'Out of Stock') or contains(text(),'Currently unavailable')]") should be(visible)
